description: Package-level external tools for napi-go (Go → N-API framework).

go.description: Go toolchain (required for compiling bindings via c-archive mode)
go.notes: System Go on PATH. Minimum: 1.21. c-archive + cgo support required. No tool-checksum pinning yet — follow iocraft-builder's rustc pattern: detect at build, error clearly if missing.

clang.description: C compiler used to link the N-API shim against Go's c-archive
clang.notes: System clang (Xcode on macOS, package on Linux, MSVC or mingw on Windows). The build driver resolves and invokes it directly.
